category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP / particulate mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Indonesia market (mandatory or voluntary SNI certification via accredited LSPro issuing SPPT-SNI, Kemnaker Ministry of Manpower K3 occupational-safety framework, Kemenkes/BPOM route for medical masks).

target_market_label.zh: 印度尼西亚（SNI / 工业部）

title.en: China-to-Indonesia PPE Respirator (Particulate Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入印度尼西亚（SNI）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入印尼（SNI）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 / GB 19083) documentation against Indonesian market requirements: SNI (Standar Nasional Indonesia) conformity via an accredited LSPro issuing the SPPT-SNI and SNI mark, BSN as the national standards body, the Ministry of Industry (Kemenperin), the Kemnaker (Ministry of Manpower) K3 occupational-safety framework, the in-country importer (API-U / NIB), and the Kemenkes/BPOM route that applies to medical masks rather than industrial respirators.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件与印度尼西亚市场要求对照，涵盖SNI（印度尼西亚国家标准）合规——经认可的LSPro签发SPPT-SNI及SNI标志、国家标准化局（BSN）、工业部（Kemenperin）、劳动部（Kemnaker）K3职业安全框架、在地进口商（API-U/NIB），以及适用于医用口罩而非工业呼吸器的卫生部（Kemenkes）/BPOM路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件與印尼市場要求對照，涵蓋SNI（印尼國家標準）合規——經認可的LSPro簽發SPPT-SNI及SNI標誌、國家標準化局（BSN）、工業部（Kemenperin）、勞動部（Kemnaker）K3職業安全框架、在地進口商（API-U/NIB），以及適用於醫用口罩而非工業呼吸器的衛生部（Kemenkes）/BPOM路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body (LSPro) determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Indonesian law, SNI standards, the scope of any accredited LSPro, and BSN / Kemenperin / Kemnaker / Kemenkes practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. Whether a respirator or mask falls under a mandatory SNI, a voluntary SNI, the Kemnaker K3 framework, or the Kemenkes/BPOM medical-device route requires case-by-case analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构（LSPro）裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行印度尼西亚法律、SNI标准、任何认可LSPro的范围及BSN/Kemenperin/Kemnaker/Kemenkes的实践。某一呼吸器或口罩究竟适用强制性SNI、自愿性SNI、Kemnaker K3框架，还是Kemenkes/BPOM医疗器械路径，需逐案分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構（LSPro）裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行印尼法律、SNI標準、任何認可LSPro的範圍及BSN/Kemenperin/Kemnaker/Kemenkes的實踐。某一呼吸器或口罩究竟適用強制性SNI、自願性SNI、Kemnaker K3框架，還是Kemenkes/BPOM醫療器械路徑，需逐案分析。

answer_first.en: Particulate respirators entering Indonesia are governed by SNI (Standar Nasional Indonesia) standards verified through an accredited LSPro (conformity assessment body) that issues an SPPT-SNI and the right to bear the SNI mark, under the BSN national standards system and the Kemenperin (Ministry of Industry) regulatory framework, with occupational-safety use additionally framed by the Kemnaker (Ministry of Manpower) K3 system. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the SNI / LSPro route. A critical boundary: medical and surgical masks are regulated by the Ministry of Health (Kemenkes) and BPOM as medical devices (izin edar alat kesehatan), NOT by the industrial SNI / Kemnaker route — the wrong classification triggers a completely different approval path. A registered in-country importer (API-U / NIB) is required.
answer_first.zh: 进入印度尼西亚的防颗粒物呼吸器受SNI（印度尼西亚国家标准）标准约束，须通过认可的LSPro（合格评定机构）核验，由其签发SPPT-SNI并授予使用SNI标志的权利，置于BSN国家标准体系及Kemenperin（工业部）监管框架之下；用于职业安全时还受Kemnaker（劳动部）K3体系约束。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足SNI/LSPro路径。关键界定：医用及外科口罩由卫生部（Kemenkes）及BPOM作为医疗器械（izin edar alat kesehatan）监管，而非工业SNI/Kemnaker路径——错误分类将触发完全不同的审批路径。须有注册的在地进口商（API-U/NIB）。
answer_first.zht: 進入印尼的防顆粒物呼吸器受SNI（印尼國家標準）標準約束，須通過認可的LSPro（合格評定機構）核驗，由其簽發SPPT-SNI並授予使用SNI標誌的權利，置於BSN國家標準體系及Kemenperin（工業部）監管框架之下；用於職業安全時還受Kemnaker（勞動部）K3體系約束。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足SNI/LSPro路徑。關鍵界定：醫用及外科口罩由衛生部（Kemenkes）及BPOM作為醫療器械（izin edar alat kesehatan）監管，而非工業SNI/Kemnaker路徑——錯誤分類將觸發完全不同的審批路徑。須有註冊的在地進口商（API-U/NIB）。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. BSN (bsn.go.id), Kemenperin (kemenperin.go.id), Kemnaker, and Kemenkes/BPOM official URLs are the primary sources for Indonesian requirements. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
